name: Tex Mex Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare an 8 x 12-inch pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add turkey, onions, and bell peppers. Cook until the turkey is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in crushed tomatoes and taco seasoning mix. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine cottage cheese, 1 cup cheddar cheese, and egg whites; set aside.
6. Overlap 3 tortillas in the bottom of the prepared pan. Overlap 6 tortillas around the sides of the pan. Spoon turkey mixture evenly over the tortillas.
7. Top with remaining 3 tortillas. Spoon cheese mixture over the turkey and tortillas.
8. Bake, covered, for 45 minutes or until the cheese mixture is set. Top with remaining cheese. Bake, uncovered, for 5 more minutes.
